news.headline: Trump supports cryptocurrency agenda, pushing for legislation on digital assets.

Elon Musk's X platform faced a massive DDoS attack on March 10, 2025, impacting thousands of users globally, with reports peaking at 40,000 disruptions. While Musk suspected Ukrainian IP addresses, experts cautioned against sole reliance on IPs for attribution. The attack was attributed to Dark Storm Team, a pro-Palestinian hacker group. Cloudflare's DDoS defense was noted for defending against a 5.6 terabit per second attack in October 2024. This incident underscores the importance of social media security amidst rising cyber threats, emphasizing the need for robust user protection, authentication methods, and cybersecurity measures. Major X outages through the years include the 2016 Dyn DDoS attack, 2020 API failures, 2022 takeover disruptions, and 2023 rate limit issues, demonstrating vulnerabilities in platform reliability. The growing significance of social media platforms calls for enhanced security, data protection, and continuous vigilance against cyber threats.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, X suffered a significant outage due to a large-scale DDoS attack, impacting a large number of users globally, with over 21,000 reports in the US and 10,800 in the UK. The attack, attributed to a pro-Palestinian hacker group called Dark Storm Team, was well-coordinated and disrupted parts of the platform for hours. The attack overwhelmed X's servers, rendering them unable to function properly and making it difficult for legitimate users to access the service. While X managed to stabilize the platform by evening, the incident highlighted the vulnerability of even major platforms to cyber threats if security measures are insufficient. The outage underscored the importance of social media security in protecting user data, enhancing user authentication, combating disinformation, and staying vigilant against cyber threats through regular security audits and updates. It also shed light on historical outages faced by the platform, including the 2016 Dyn DDoS attack and internal errors in 2020 and 2022. The incident serves as a reminder of the need for strong cybersecurity measures to ensure the reliability and trustworthiness of social media platforms in today's digital age.

news.headline: Hong Kong's RedotPay raises $40M Series A, aims to boost crypto payment adoption in Asia with Visa cards integration and blockchain expansions.
news.summary: Hong Kong-based RedotPay recently completed a $40 million Series A funding round led by Lightspeed, aiming to facilitate cryptocurrency payments in everyday transactions. The company offers physical Visa cards for ATM withdrawals and virtual cards for digital payments. RedotPay added Solana in 2024 and Ethereum layer 2 Arbitrum in 2025, collaborating with StraitX and Visa for retail crypto payments in Singapore. Competing with Infini, RedotPay faces cross-border service restrictions. Stablecoins are gaining more popularity in Asia for direct cryptocurrency payments, with Japan emphasizing stablecoin adoption. Progmat, supported by Mitsubishi UFJ, leads Japan’s digital asset ecosystem while China has banned crypto trading.

Dr. Mehmet Oz undergoes Senate Finance Committee confirmation for overseeing Medicare and Medicaid.
news.summary: A confirmation hearing is scheduled for Friday by the Senate Finance Committee regarding Dr. Mehmet Oz, the television personality who has been nominated to oversee key health programs for older Americans and individuals with low income.

news.headline: ITRI and partners launch world-leading 5G NTN trials, showcasing air interface in low Earth orbit.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, in Hsinchu, the Industrial Technology Research Institute (ITRI) and key eco-system partners showcased the 5G air interface functioning in low Earth orbit (LEO). This demonstration was a crucial step in preparing for the implementation of 5G Non-Terrestrial Network (NTN) standards. The successful showcase highlights the progress towards integrating 5G technology into LEO operations, marking a significant advancement in the telecommunications sector.

news.headline: New 2024 ezW2Correction software on Amazon offers unlimited form processing for years 2015-2024 at one flat rate.
news.summary: Amazon clients can now access the latest 2024 version of EzW2Correction software in REDMOND, Wash. The software allows processing of unlimited forms from 2015 to 2024 for a flat rate. Halfpricesoft.com, a business established over two decades ago, offers this service to cater to business owners.

news.headline: DOYU's Q4 2024 showed total net revenue of RMB1.136B, gross profit of RMB69.8M, & net loss of RMB163.7M. Full-year revenue was RMB4.271B with a net loss of RMB297.4M. Strategic cost optimizations were emphasized for long-term growth. Livestreaming revenue decreased by 28.4% in Q4, while innovative business, advertising, and other revenues increased by 47.2%. Adjusted net loss was RMB68.8M in Q4 and RMB239.9M for the full year 2024. Cash and equivalents dropped to RMB4.468B by December 2024. Company to focus on revenue diversification and improving cost efficiency in 2025.
news.summary: DouYu International Holdings Limited announced its financial results for Q4 2024 and the full year ended December 31, 2024. In Q4 2024, total net revenues were RMB1,136.0 million (US$155.6 million), showing a decrease from RMB1,296.0 million in Q4 2023. The company experienced a net loss of RMB163.7 million (US$22.4 million) in Q4 2024 compared to a net loss of RMB62.2 million in Q4 2023. Average mobile MAUs were 44.5 million, and quarterly average paying users were 3.3 million in Q4 2024. For the full year 2024, total net revenues were RMB4,270.8 million (US$585.1 million), showing a decline from RMB5,530.4 million in 2023. The company's gross profit was RMB323.8 million (US$44.4 million) for the full year 2024. Adjusted net loss for the full year 2024 was RMB239.9 million (US$32.9 million). Cost optimization measures were taken to improve the financial health, focus on revenue diversification, and optimize cost structure. The company aims for sustainable long-term growth and value for shareholders.

Explore Italy's 'Motor Valley,' home to Ferraris, Lamborghinis, Maseratis, and more for enthusiasts to admire and drive.
news.summary: In a region known as the "Motor Valley" in the country, car enthusiasts have the opportunity to view and test drive prestigious brands such as Maserati, Lamborghini, and Ferrari. The area showcases a wide range of luxury vehicles, offering visitors a chance to experience firsthand the craftsmanship and performance of these renowned Italian automotive brands. With numerous options available, visitors can immerse themselves in the world of high-end cars and witness the latest advancements in technology and design.

news.headline: "Restaurant workers feel about the phrase ‘Yes, Chef’ that originated in 19th-century France and gained popularity. It reflects changing kitchen dynamics."
news.summary: Originating in 19th-century France, the phrase has gained significant popularity in everyday conversations, especially due to its association with "The Bear." It provides insight into the changing dynamics within kitchen environments and highlights shifts in hierarchies.

news.summary: When President Trump began his first term, the stock market was consistently rising. However, during this administration, there has been a notable shift as stock prices are now trending downward.

Russell 2000 Index signals economic trouble as it heads towards a bear market; more sensitive to downturns than S&P 500.
news.summary: The Russell 2000 index, comprising small companies that are more susceptible to economic downturns than those in the S&P 500, is on track to potentially fall into a bear market. This signifies a significant drop of at least 20% from the previous high. Small businesses listed on this index may face challenges amidst adverse economic conditions compared to larger corporations.

news.headline: Gemini sets world record with 1,000 drones forming Bitcoin logo in Texas sky, celebrates US Strategic Bitcoin Reserve.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency exchange Gemini broke a Guinness World Record by using 1,000 drones to create the Bitcoin logo in the sky, marking the largest-ever aerial display of a currency symbol. The event took place in Austin, Texas, celebrating the US Strategic Bitcoin Reserve initiative. The drone show also depicted a rocket launch and moon landing. Gemini received a certificate for the accomplishment. The Bitcoin logo has evolved over the years, with the current symbol "₿" being widely accepted as the official logo. The logo originated as a gold coin with "BC" but was later changed to the current symbol. Gemimi's event aimed to explore the future of money with the iconic Bitcoin logo.

Gemini sets new record as 1,000 drones create Bitcoin logo in Austin sky, celebrating US Strategic Bitcoin Reserve.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency exchange Gemini set a new Guinness World Record by deploying 1,000 drones in Austin, Texas on March 13 to form the Bitcoin logo in the sky, making it the largest-ever aerial display of a currency symbol. The event celebrated the US Strategic Bitcoin Reserve initiative. Gemini's drone show included depictions of a rocket launch and the moon landing. Following the successful show, Gemini received a certificate for "The largest aerial display of a currency symbol formed by multirotor/drones." The Bitcoin logo has evolved over 16 years, starting with a gold coin with "BC" text to the current symbol "₿" introduced by Satoshi Nakamoto in 2010. The current logo, designed by a community member named bitboy, features an orange background and Nakamoto's "₿" logo tiled clockwise by 14%.

news.headline: Equity matter involving $100 million.

Trump-backed WLFI raises $550M through token sales, including $250M in latest sale. Project endorsed by Trump family. Raised over $590M since launch. Raised concerns in crypto community. Magazine raises conflict of interest questions.
news.summary: World Liberty Financial, a DeFi project backed by the Trump family, has raised $250 million in its second token sale, totaling $550 million from selling 25% of its total token supply. President Donald Trump and his sons endorse the project as a move towards financial innovation. The first sale in Oct. 2024 earned $300 million by selling 20 billion WLFI tokens at $0.015 each, with the recently completed sale at $0.05 each. Tron's Justin Sun invested $30 million, and Web3Port and Oddiyana Ventures also invested. Despite raising over $590 million, concerns have been raised by the crypto community about its legitimacy and business model. Critics question whether it truly offers innovation or is a cash grab, with some calling it a "pay-to-play" scheme. WLFI has not publicly addressed these criticisms.

news.headline: Stocks to watch Friday: Ulta Beauty, DocuSign. Analysts expect Li Auto Inc. to report earnings of 34 cents/share on revenue of $6.76 billion. Li Auto shares gained 0.7% to $28.92 in after-hours trading. RLX Technology Inc. expected to post earnings at 20 cents.
news.summary: Today, U.S. stock futures are on the rise with investor attention on specific stocks. Wall Street predicts Li Auto Inc. (NASDAQ: LI) to disclose earnings of 34 cents per share with a revenue of $6.76 billion before the market opens. In after-hours trading, Li Auto shares climbed 0.7% to reach $28.92. Additionally, analysts forecast RLX Technology Inc. (NYSE: RLX) to announce quarterly earnings of 20 cents per share. For more information, visit the full article on a financial news website.

news.headline: Dow drops 500+ points on tariff threats; Fear & Greed Index in 'Extreme Fear' zone. Economic data: no change in producer prices, jobless claims drop to 220,000. Trump threatens 200% tariff on European wine.
news.summary: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index showed a decrease in market sentiment, remaining in the “Extreme Fear” zone as of Thursday. U.S. stocks closed lower, with the Dow Jones falling over 500 points following the release of economic data. U.S. producer prices in February remained steady from January, contrasting with a 0.6% rise in the previous period and below the expected 0.3% increase. Initial U.S. jobless claims dropped by 2,000 to 220,000 in the first week of March, lower than the anticipated 225,000. President Donald Trump threatened to impose a 200% tariff on European wine on Thursday. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Russia reportedly using BTC, USDT for oil trades with China, India amid sanctions, with one trader handling monthly transactions worth tens of millions. Crypto used in foreign oil trade regardless of sanctions. Chinese buyer pays in yuan, converted to crypto and then to Russian rubles. Bank of Russia proposes-legalize crypto investments for high-net-worth individuals holding at least $1.1 million in securities. Bitcoin use restricted in mainland China but China may be holding at least 193,000 BTC.
news.summary: Russian oil companies have been using cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and Tether’s USDt for trade with China and India amidst international sanctions. Reports suggest a trader conducts tens of millions of dollars in monthly transactions using digital assets. Intermediaries manage offshore accounts for oil trades where Chinese buyers pay in yuan, these funds are converted to crypto, then to Russian rubles. Despite sanctions, Russia plans to continue using crypto for oil trade. Meanwhile, China maintains strict crypto regulations but remains a leader in Bitcoin mining. The Bank of Russia is proposing to legalize crypto investments for wealthy individuals. Chinese government possibly holds 193,000 BTC. Mainland China's strict crypto ban contrasts with Hong Kong's crypto-friendly environment.

news.headline: XRP price may surge 46% post Ripple's Dubai license; $2.30 key level to surpass for rally. Ripple secures first ME license. Regulatory approval unlocks $40B remittance and $400B trade markets in UAE. SEC case settlement could be near amid new leadership's leniency.
news.summary: XRP's price is poised for a potential breakout from a descending triangle pattern, with a possible 46% gain as Ripple acquired its first license in the Middle East from the Dubai Financial Services Authority. XRP/USD pair has been consolidating in the pattern since hitting a high of $3.40, finding recent support at $2.00. If XRP closes above $2.30, it may rally towards $3.00, then $3.27, and eventually reach $3.40. The approval in Dubai allows Ripple access to the UAE's $40 billion remittance and $400 billion trade markets. XRP price saw a 6% increase following the news. Moreover, the potential resolution of the SEC's case against Ripple adds to positive sentiment around XRP. The recent trend of regulatory leniency could benefit Ripple, with rumors suggesting a possible end to the legal battle between Ripple and the SEC. This news should be read with investment caution as it is not offering financial advice.

news.headline: Calls for stricter regulations on political memecoins following $4B Libra collapse. Insider cash-outs trigger massive losses for 74,698 traders. Source: Kobeissi Letter.
news.summary: After the Libra token, endorsed by Argentine President Javier Milei, experienced a $4 billion market cap wipeout due to insider cash-outs, industry experts cautioned that politically backed cryptocurrencies should implement stronger investor protections and liquidity safeguards. DWF Labs revealed that at least eight insider wallets withdrew $107 million in liquidity, leading to the collapse. To prevent such incidents, tokens with presidential supports will need enhanced safety measures like liquidity locking and launch restrictions to curb insider trading and market manipulation. The meltdown caused 74,698 traders to collectively lose $286 million. DWF Labs emphasized the significance of liquidity locking to provide stability during token launches and high volatility periods. Furthermore, the report underscores the necessity for more transparent token launch mechanisms to avert rug pulls and insider fraud. The need for stringent due diligence, pre-launch wallet transparency, and better regulatory oversight to protect investors was also stressed. Milei requested an investigation into government members, and impeachment calls were made against him for endorsing a cryptocurrency that resulted in financial loss.

news.headline: Innovent's SYCUME® approved by NMPA for Thyroid Eye Disease treatment in China.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, Innovent Biologics, Inc., a leading biopharmaceutical company based in SAN FRANCISCO and SUZHOU, China, announced its latest developments. Innovent, listed on the HKEX with the symbol 01801, is renowned for its development, manufacturing, and commercialization of top-tier medicines in various fields such as oncology, autoimmune diseases, cardiovascular conditions, among others.

news.headline: Li Auto Inc. reports Q4 revenues of RMB44.3B, 158,696 deliveries; Full year revenues at RMB144.5B, 500,508 deliveries.

news.headline: Safello partners with Zumo to lead Swedish crypto sector sustainability with MiCAR, a move aiming at setting sustainability standard.
news.summary: A major cryptocurrency exchange based in Sweden, Safello, has formed a key partnership with Zumo to ensure compliance with sustainability reporting requirements under MiCAR regulations. The collaboration, announced on March 14, 2025, involves Safello, a top player in the Nordic region for cryptocurrency exchanges, joining forces with Zumo. This move highlights their commitment to meeting sustainability disclosure standards mandated by MiCAR. The partnership between Safello and Zumo signifies a significant step towards ensuring adherence to regulatory requirements in the cryptocurrency industry.

news.headline: WeRide Inc. announces unaudited financials for Q4 2024 & full year ended Dec 31, 2024. Achieved record-high robotaxi revenue. Total revenue for Q4 2024 was RMB140.8 million ($19.3 million), compared to RMB144.8 million in 2023. Total revenue for full year 2024 was RMB361.1 million ($49.5 million), down from RMB401.8 million in 2023. Net loss for Q4 2024 was RMB592.4 million ($81.2 million), up from RMB379.3 million in 2023. Net loss for full year 2024 was RMB2,516.8 million ($344.8 million), up from RMB1,949.1 million in 2023. Non-IFRS adjusted net loss for full year 2024 was RMB801.9 million ($109.9 million), up from RMB501.7 million in 2023.
news.summary: WeRide Inc., a global leader in autonomous driving technology, announced its unaudited financial results for Q4 and full year 2024. The company achieved record-high robotaxi revenue and strong international revenue, showcasing its leadership in autonomous driving. They deployed end-to-end models in Level-4 driverless and ADAS systems, using 1 million hours of driving data. WeRide expanded globally, launching robotaxi services in various cities, including Abu Dhabi, Beijing, Switzerland, and Guangzhou, as well as robobus services in Spain, France, and Switzerland. They also advanced their Robovan W5 logistics vehicle. Focusing on product innovation, WeRide obtained ISO/IEC 27001:2022 certification and was listed on the Fortune Future 50 List. In terms of financials, revenue for Q4 2024 was RMB140.8 million, with RMB51.7 million from products and RMB89.1 million from services. The total revenue for the full year 2024 was RMB361.1 million. The net loss for Q4 was RMB592.4 million and RMB2,516.8 million for the full year. WeRide had RMB4,888.4 million in cash equivalents as of December 31, 2024. Their total equity was RMB7,066,019. Under the non-IFRS financial measures, the adjusted net loss for Q4 was RMB245.5 million and RMB801.9 million for the full year. WeRide's management remains committed to further expansion and innovation in the autonomous technology industry.
